About Ekta

Where science
meets soulful movement

Hi, I'm Ekta — a certified yoga teacher, therapist, and movement educator based in India. With a PG Diploma in Yogic Science, an MSc in Yoga Therapy, and over 7 years of dedicated practice, I bring both academic depth and lived experience to every session.

I've guided 10,000+ students — from beginners to national athletes — through transformative journeys of strength, flexibility, and inner peace. Whether it's mat or machine Pilates, aerial yoga, or sound healing, my approach is always personalised, evidence-based, and full of heart.

MSc Yoga Therapy
Academic foundation in therapeutic applications
YCB Level 3
Govt. of India – Teacher & Evaluator
Gold Medalist

What I Offer

Practices for every body

🧘
Yoga Therapy
Personalised therapeutic sessions targeting specific health conditions, injuries, and chronic pain — rooted in classical yoga science.
🌀
Mat & Machine Pilates
Core-focused sessions on mat or reformer apparatus for postural alignment, strength, and full-body awareness.
🎵
Sound Healing
Immersive soundscapes using singing bowls and instruments to dissolve stress, restore calm, and balance energy.
🌸
Aerial Yoga
Suspended in a silk hammock — decompressing the spine, deepening inversions, and making the impossible accessible.
🏕️
Retreats & Workshops
Immersive group experiences combining asana, breathwork, meditation, and community — online and offline.
📱
Online & Home Sessions
Flexible 1-on-1 sessions from the comfort of your home — for national and international students worldwide.
